parameters.subject: =⚠️ Dispute Opened — Commission #{{ $json.commissionId }} by {{ $json.partnerName }}
parameters.message:
=

Dispute Opened

Partner: {{ $json.partnerName }} (ID: {{ $json.partnerId }})

Commission ID: #{{ $json.commissionId }}

Amount in Dispute: ${{ $json.amount }}

Reason: {{ $json.reason }}

Opened: {{ $json.openedAt }}

Per policy, you have 72 hours to resolve this dispute before it escalates.

Review Dispute →
=⚠️ ProLnk Dispute: {{ $json.partnerName }} opened dispute on commission #{{ $json.commissionId }} (${{ $json.amount }}). Reason: {{ $json.reason }}. Review: https://prolnk.manus.space/admin/disputes

_meta.description: Fires when a partner opens a dispute. Alerts admin via email + SMS. Payload: { commissionId, partnerId, partnerName, amount, reason, openedAt }. Requires ADMIN_EMAIL and ADMIN_PHONE env vars.
_meta.setup: 1. Set ADMIN_EMAIL, ADMIN_PHONE, Twilio + Resend env vars. 2. Wire webhook in ProLnk admin → Webhooks → Dispute Opened. 3. Activate.
